title: Connected Hotbar (Dark)
body:
Connected Hotbar (Dark)

Installation • Issues • More

Removes the dividers between slots in the hotbar making it one big seamless box. _If you want the normal edition go [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-hotbar)._
Compatibility
Currently: - Version 1.20.1 _should_ be compatible with most versions **before**. - Version 1.20.2 _should_ be compatible with most versions **after**. Just ignore the incompatibility warning in the resource pack selection menu. _If there are any issues please submit it on the issues page._
